text:
people lives on utopian ideal and
also some kind of mass fantasy in the collective
unconscious one of such fantasy is this- having no war.
Another one is the arrival of anti Christ and the returning
of Krishna and Christ. All these do not have astrological
combination and one can only intuitively guess. May be it
is allegorical and metaphorical.
Following is my conclusion.
The talk of age of peace and lasting peace in humanity will
not arrive even by 2050. As long the planet of war, mars
exist there will be wars. Ancient rishis might have
understood this and clearly in all purnas there is always
mention of wars.
Secondly there will be theory like the world
ending,,arrival of antichrist and return of the historical
figure will still continue.
One thing is sure for the world to be peaceful. First
politics should not exist and honesty with kindness in

speech must be practiced. If this is not achieved then
there is no question of lasting peace.
